hypotheses.statement: Reversible-interventions track of the bundle, if authorized alone, will produce policy outcomes within accepted error bands.
hypotheses.distinguishing_prediction: Outcome metrics at policy-cycle horizon remain within prior-band variance.

hypotheses.statement: Irreversible-interventions track, if bundled with reversible, will receive downstream authorization regardless of evidence accumulation.
hypotheses.distinguishing_prediction: Authorization decisions at year 5 are independent of replication results for irreversible track.

hypotheses.statement: Comparable-alternative funding at matched scale will produce comparable or greater policy resilience than the bundled program.
hypotheses.distinguishing_prediction: Parallel comparable-alternative pilots show resilience metrics >= bundled-program metrics at year 5.
